title: Fountain Towers
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Fountain Towers''' was a residential district in [[Sath]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]. A chord [[Chronometer/Legends|clock]] in the district played the first three notes of the [[Sathan national anthem]] every half-hour.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]''

[[Category:Planetary regions and territories]]
